articles.description: Based on the complaint given by the duped victims, a case was registered at the Vedayapalem Police Station under the relevant sections of cheating and forgery; during investigation, ₹25.20 lakh was seized from the accused so far.

articles.title: 70.58% candidates clear Telangana Intermediate Public Examination March 2026
articles.description: The results of the first-year candidates, combining all streams, stood at 66.20%. In all, over 9.97 lakh candidates registered for the examination

articles.title: UFC 327: Ulberg wins light-heavyweight belt with knockout in front of Trump
articles.description: Carlos Ulberg takes the UFC light heavyweight title with a first-round knockout win over Jiri Prochazka in Miami.

articles.title: Live: PM Modi, Yogi Adityanath to hold rallies in poll-bound Bengal
articles.description: Live PM Modi Yogi Adityanath to hold rallies in pollbound Bengal

articles.title: Deadly stampede at Haiti's historic Laferriere Citadel leaves at least 30 dead
articles.description: A stampede at Haiti's Laferriere Citadel has resulted in at least 30 deaths, with concerns that the toll may increase.

topStories.title: Pakistan urges US and Iran to uphold ceasefire after talks end
topStories.description: Pakistani Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar has insisted the US and Iran must uphold their ceasefire agreement.

topStories.title: Two Supertankers U-Turn in Hormuz as US-Iran Talks Break Down
topStories.description: Two empty supertankers attempted to make their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Sunday, only to make a last-minute U-turn just as peace negotiations between the US and Iran broke down, threatening a fragile ceasefire.

topStories.title: US and Iran fail to reach peace deal after marathon talks in Pakistan
topStories.description: Vice President JD Vance says Iran chose not to accept US terms, while Iran says it did not expect a deal at the first meeting.

topStories.description: Campaign details of party chief Kharge, Rahul, and Priyanka will be released soon, says AICC in-charge for Tamil Nadu Girish Chodankar

dailyNews.description: The BBC's Europe Editor Katya Adler reports from Prime Minister Victor Orbán's home town of Felscút.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance says Iran refused to commit on nuclear weapons, calls 21-hour Islamabad ceasefire talks breakdown 'bad news'
dailyNews.description: JD Vance said Iran refused to make a long-term commitment not to develop a nuclear weapon and leaving Washington's ‘final and best offer’ on the table.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu next to Middle East map: ‘We strangled them and have more to do’
dailyNews.description: Standing by a map, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu describes how six countries wanted to strangle us’.

dailyNews.title: YSRCP push ‘Mavigun’ capital proposal aggressively
dailyNews.description: YSR Congress is promoting the Mavigun corridor as a capital model, despite Amaravati's approval, aiming for economic growth ahead of 2029 elections.

dailyNews.title: Eric Swalwell accused of paying nanny with campaign funds while she lacked work authorization
dailyNews.description: Two complaints allege Rep. Eric Swalwell violated immigration and employment laws to keep his nanny in the U.S. using campaign funds as payment.

dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance says U.S.-Iran talks ended without a deal after Iran refused American terms, calling the outcome bad news for Iran more than the United States.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo calls out 'delusion of omnipotence' fueling Iran war in vigil for peace at St. Peter's Basilica
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo decries the "delusion of omnipotence" he says is driving the war in Iran, urging peace during a Saturday vigil at St. Peter's Basilica.

dailyNews.title: Seven-foot statue unveiled honoring Magawa, award-winning rat who found more than 100 landmines in Cambodia
dailyNews.description: Magawa, the famous landmine-sniffing rat who won a gold medal for bravery in Cambodia, has been honored with a massive stone statue in Siem Reap.

dailyNews.title: Inside Kristen Welker's interview with the Cuban president
dailyNews.description: In his first interview with a U.S. broadcast network, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel insisted to @MeetThePress moderator Kristen Welker that he's not "stepping down," despite the Trump administration's increasing pressure on Cuba. Kristen joins "Here's the Scoop" to discuss what was happening behind the scenes during her interview.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.description: The main attraction early at UFC 327 on Saturday night wasn’t any of the fighters, but President Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Young men in U.S. to be automatically registered into military draft
dailyNews.description: The U.S. plans to roll out a system by December that automatically registers young men for the military draft, a policy signed into law by President Trump last year.
